prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland because the Seagreen Wind Energy Limited offshore wind farm is located off the coast of Scotland, and the regulation of electricity transmission falls under both UK and Scottish jurisdiction, particularly for renewable energy projects in Scottish waters.
